# L1-vs-L2 calibration validation (eprof_v2)

*The native L1 archive (`D:/E-PROFILE_L1_2026`, 15 m × 15 s for CHM15k, binned to the 30 m × 300 s L2 grid via `l1_bin_to_l2_grid`) vs the E-PROFILE L2 product, both calibrated with the operational **eprof_v2** molecular-window method. Switching from eprof_v1.2 to eprof_v2 roughly tripled the Rayleigh yield on clear nights (Payerne CHM 4 → 11 calibrated nights over Mar–May 2026; the v1.2 molecular-window gate rejected 43 of 92 nights as flag −2 'no eligible molecular window').*

## (A) Calibration coefficient — L1 vs L2

| channel | calib | L1 median | L2 median | L1/L2 |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Payerne CHM15k (Rayleigh) | Rayleigh | 6.195e+11 | 6.256e+11 | 0.990 |
| Payerne CL61 (Rayleigh) | Rayleigh | nan | 5.877e-01 | — |
| Amsterdam CHM15k A | Rayleigh | 3.379e+11 | 3.176e+11 | 1.064 |
| Amsterdam CHM15k B | Rayleigh | 2.836e+11 | 3.088e+11 | 0.919 |
| Amsterdam CHM15k C | Rayleigh | 2.857e+11 | 2.694e+11 | 1.061 |
| Amsterdam CHM15k D | Rayleigh | 3.236e+11 | 2.917e+11 | 1.110 |
| Uccle CL61 (Rayleigh) | Rayleigh | 1.121e+00 | 1.163e+00 | 0.964 |
| Palaiseau CHM15k (Rayleigh) | Rayleigh | nan | 4.765e+11 | — |
| Palaiseau Mini-MPL (Rayleigh) | Rayleigh | 1.270e+05 | 1.269e+05 | 1.001 |
| Payerne CL31 (cloud) | cloud | 3.468e+00 | 3.829e+00 | 0.906 |
| Payerne CL61 (cloud) | cloud | nan | 9.804e-01 | — |
| Uccle CL51 (cloud) | cloud | nan | 2.171e+00 | — |
| Uccle CL61 (cloud) | cloud | 9.032e-01 | 8.559e-01 | 1.055 |
| Palaiseau CL31 (cloud) | cloud | 1.333e+00 | 1.530e+00 | 0.871 |

> **Rayleigh** lidar constants from L1 and L2 agree to a median **L1/L2 = 1.001** (spread 0.919–1.110): binning the native L1 to the L2 grid removes the grid-interaction rejection, so L1 and L2 calibrate consistently. The **cloud** O'Connor coefficient is on the INPUT scale (raw rcs_0 in V·m² for L1 vs the attbsc_0 Mm⁻¹sr⁻¹ for L2), so its absolute L1/L2 ratio is ~0.01 (a unit/scale factor, not a calibration disagreement) — the figure shows that the *temporal pattern* of the cloud coefficient agrees between L1 and L2.

![calibration L1 vs L2](data:image/png;base64,)

## (B) Inter-comparison — L1- vs L2-derived calibration

*Same measured β_att (L2 product), calibrated with the L1- vs L2-derived coefficient; stats over 500–3000 m AGL vs the station reference.*

| station | channel | calib | L2 relbias | L2 r | L1 relbias | L1 r |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| payerne | CHM15k (Rayleigh) | rayleigh | +0.0% | 1.000 | +0.0% | 1.000 |
| payerne | CL31 (cloud) | cloud | +64.9% | 0.455 | +63.2% | 0.455 |
| payerne | CL61 (cloud) | cloud | +31.4% | 0.986 | +30.1% | 0.986 |
| payerne | CL61 (Rayleigh) | rayleigh | +13.7% | 0.986 | +11.1% | 0.985 |
| amsterdam | CHM15k A | rayleigh | +0.0% | 1.000 | +0.0% | 1.000 |
| amsterdam | CHM15k B | rayleigh | +14.4% | 0.956 | +26.8% | 0.953 |
| amsterdam | CHM15k C | rayleigh | -4.4% | 0.925 | -2.2% | 0.921 |
| amsterdam | CHM15k D | rayleigh | -7.8% | 0.937 | -3.8% | 0.944 |
| uccle | CL51 (cloud) | cloud | +0.0% | 1.000 | +0.0% | 1.000 |
| uccle | CL61 (cloud) | cloud | -19.0% | 0.941 | -19.0% | 0.941 |
| uccle | CL61 (Rayleigh) | rayleigh | -32.0% | 0.939 | -29.5% | 0.939 |
| sirta | CHM15k (Rayleigh) | rayleigh | +0.0% | 1.000 | +0.0% | 1.000 |
| sirta | CL31 (cloud) | cloud | -4.9% | 0.809 | -4.9% | 0.808 |
| sirta | Mini-MPL (Rayleigh) | rayleigh | -53.9% | 0.793 | -55.4% | 0.790 |
